model.description: The model to use for batch processing. Only one model can be used per batch job.

endpoint.description: The API endpoint to use for each request in the batch.

input_files.description: A list of file IDs containing batch input data in JSONL format. Use this for file-based batching.

requests.description: A list of inline requests to be batched. Use this for inline batching as an alternative to input_files.

metadata.description: Optional custom metadata for the batch job.

timeout_hours.description: The maximum number of hours the batch job should run before timing out.
